nodes.label: Intercept NOTIFY_DEBUGGER_ABOUT_RX_PAGES and touch the pages.
nodes.norm_label: intercept notify_debugger_about_rx_pages and touch the pages.

nodes.label: Clean Architecture
nodes.rationale: Achieves independence of frameworks, testability, independence of UI, independence of database, independence of external agencies. Dependency direction: Presentation → Domain ← Data.

nodes.label: Riverpod (flutter_riverpod)
nodes.rationale: Chosen over StateNotifier for code-gen support, type safety, and testability. Uses @riverpod annotation with code generation, not manual StateNotifierProvider.

nodes.label: GoRouter
nodes.rationale: Declarative routing with deep link support. Integrated as a Riverpod provider for reactive auth-based routing.

nodes.label: Drift (SQLite ORM)
nodes.rationale: Offline-first local database. Primary data source for all reads/writes. Supabase is secondary. Uses drift_flutter for platform connections.

nodes.label: Supabase
nodes.rationale: Remote backend for auth, remote database, and API. Secondary/truth source when online. Project ref: bheohnfxjnwdkqvftbnc.

nodes.label: Freezed 3.x
nodes.rationale: Provides immutable data classes, union types, copyWith, and equality. Replaces dartz Either with Result<T> Freezed union. 3.x requires abstract keyword on all @freezed classes.

nodes.label: Result<T> Pattern
nodes.rationale: Freezed union type replacing Either<Failure, T> from dartz. Uses String for error messages instead of complex Failure class hierarchy. Zero external dependencies beyond Freezed. Defined at lib/domain/core/result.dart.

nodes.label: Repository Segregation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Repositories split by operation type (query, command, import, export, auth, profile), not by entity. Ensures ISP compliance — each use case injects only the interface it needs. Six focused interfaces in domain/repositories/.

nodes.label: Curated Ledger Design System
nodes.rationale: Premium stationery journal aesthetic. Mood: Calm Authority. Airy, minimalist, editorial, refined. Rejects rigid fintech conventions in favor of tonal layering and generous breathing room. Stitch project 4123685228949170691.

nodes.label: Tonal Layering
nodes.rationale: Replaces traditional Material Design shadows (0-24dp). Depth achieved through background color shifts: Base (#f9f9f9) → Section (#f2f4f4) → Surface (#ebeeef) → Interactive (#ffffff). Ambient shadows reserved for FABs and modals only.

nodes.label: SOLID Principles
nodes.rationale: Strictly enforced. SRP: each use case has one responsibility. OCP: extend via new implementations. LSP: all repository implementations substitutable. ISP: 6 segregated repository interfaces. DIP: domain defines interfaces, data implements.

nodes.label: build_runner Code Generation
nodes.rationale: Three codegen tools produce gitignored generated files: Freezed (.freezed.dart, .g.dart), Drift (.g.dart), Riverpod generator (.g.dart). Never edit generated files. Rerun after changing Freezed classes, Drift tables, or Riverpod providers.

nodes.label: Offline-First Strategy
nodes.rationale: All writes go to Drift first. Background sync engine monitors connectivity and pushes unsynced records to Supabase. All reads from Drift for instant offline-capable responses. On login, full pull from Supabase seeds local DB. Conflict resolution: last-write-wins based on updated_at.

nodes.label: Domain Layer
nodes.rationale: Pure Dart, zero external dependencies. Contains entities, repository interfaces, use cases, enums. No Flutter, no Drift, no Supabase imports. Dependency rule: dependencies point inward, never outward.

nodes.label: Data Layer
nodes.rationale: Implements domain interfaces. Contains Drift database, Supabase data sources, Freezed DTOs, repository implementations. Never imported by presentation layer.

nodes.label: Presentation Layer
nodes.rationale: UI + Riverpod providers. Never imports data layer. Uses GoRouter for navigation. Provider chain: Supabase client → data sources → repositories → use cases.

nodes.label: DTO Pattern
nodes.rationale: Freezed DTOs in data/models/ bridge between Drift/Supabase and domain entities. Methods: fromJson (Supabase), toCompanion (Drift), toEntity/fromEntity (domain conversion). Same model serializes to both Drift SQLite maps and Supabase JSON.

nodes.label: Freezed 3.x abstract Keyword Requirement
nodes.rationale: Freezed 3.x requires the abstract keyword before class definitions. Omitting it produces a specific build error. Always write: @freezed abstract class MyState with _$MyState { }

nodes.label: No-Line Rule
nodes.rationale: Standard 1px borders strictly prohibited for sectioning. Structural boundaries defined exclusively through background color shifts. Ghost border fallback: 1px #adb3b4 at 15% opacity on identical-color backgrounds.

nodes.label: Context7 Documentation Rule
nodes.rationale: Always query MCP Context7 first before using any package API, configuration, or pattern. Ensures code uses current APIs and avoids deprecated patterns from outdated training data.

links.rationale: GoRouter is integrated as a Riverpod provider for reactive auth-based routing. Riverpod watches auth state to trigger redirects.
Riverpod providers use Freezed union types (TradeFormState, ImportState, etc.) for state management. Freezed .when() pattern drives UI rendering.
Result<T> is defined in domain/core/result.dart and used across all layers: repositories return it, use cases return it, providers consume it.
All segregated repository interfaces return Result<T> — the pattern is consistent across all six interfaces.

Both are Freezed union types representing success/failure states. Result<T> is for repository/use case returns; TradeFormState extends the pattern for UI-specific states (initial, loading, success, error).
Closed positions display win/loss via tonal accent bars (Forest Depth vs Muted Brick), not traditional color coding.
